patterns_identified: Developer reached maximum retry count (3) without creating a valid PR
knowledge_summary: Today's review by Marco ended with MAX_RETRIES_REACHED status. Diego (Developer) reached the maximum retry count (3) without creating a valid PR for the feature/2026-03-03-acoustics-constants-fix branch. This pattern indicates a gap in the pre-review verification process. Added RULE-005 to enforce PR existence verification before requesting review.
